rationale.R1.2: The control loop described is reactive-only, not predictive.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is absent; no confidence or missing evidence markers are provided.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is poor; the claims generalize well beyond the narrow evaluation scope.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is a concern; the system's performance in failure cases is not thoroughly evaluated.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are lacking; no clear description of the model or its components is provided.
